validated_gaps.title: Context Window Optimization / Tool Schema Compression

evidence.signal: Published '10 strategies to reduce MCP token bloat' - dedicated article on the problem
SEP-1576 filed on official MCP repo: 'Mitigating Token Bloat in MCP: Reducing Schema Redundancy and Optimizing Tool Selection'
'Your MCP Server Is Eating Your Context Window' - widely shared article detailing 72% context consumption
Anthropic shipped Deferred Tool Loading and Tool Search in Feb 2026, achieving 85% token reduction - validates massive demand
Issue #1280: 'MCP Context Bloat: Suggestion for Lightweight Profile'
'Thousands of MCP Tools, Zero Context Left: The Bloat Tax Breaking AI Agents'

demand_signals.community_sentiment: Universal frustration. One of the most discussed MCP limitations. Tool selection accuracy drops from 43% to 14% with bloated tool menus.
demand_signals.competing_solutions_emerging: Anthropic's deferred loading is client-side only (Claude). No universal middleware solution exists for all MCP clients.

evidence.signal: 'Stop Shipping Broken MCP Tools - A GitHub Action That Actually Checks' - developers building ad-hoc solutions
MCP Course Module 2 dedicated to GitHub Actions Integration for MCP
Tutorial: 'Automate MCP server testing using Pytest and Testcontainers: Configure GitHub Actions for CI/CD'
mcpdiff ci command auto-detects CI environments for contract testing - early-stage solution emerging

demand_signals.community_sentiment: Strong need. Developers are building custom solutions. No standardized, comprehensive CI/CD pipeline tool exists.
demand_signals.competing_solutions_emerging: mcpdiff for contract testing, MCPevals for quality scoring - fragmented, not integrated.

evidence.signal: 'I'm working on a Jira ticket should automatically surface relevant tools' - explicit demand from production users
'Why MCP Server Discovery is Harder Than It Should Be' - widely discussed
Server Cards (/.well-known/mcp.json) on roadmap but not yet shipped - validates gap exists
'Ballooning context in the MCP era' discusses need for intelligent tool routing

demand_signals.community_sentiment: Developers want intelligent, context-aware tool surfacing rather than 'connect everything, see everything' model.
demand_signals.competing_solutions_emerging: Anthropic's tool search is client-specific. No universal context-routing middleware exists.

evidence.signal: Developers report troubleshooting that takes minutes with gRPC stretches to days with MCP
'Why MCP Deployments Fail at Enterprise Scale' cites lack of tracing as key failure mode
MCPcat offers OTEL forwarding but not full distributed tracing with correlation IDs across MCP hops
Sentry launched MCP monitoring - validates demand from their customer base

demand_signals.community_sentiment: Enterprise teams find MCP debugging extremely painful. No end-to-end trace visibility exists.
demand_signals.competing_solutions_emerging: MCPcat, Sentry MCP monitoring are partial. No MCP-native tracing standard.

validated_gaps.title: Push Notifications / Event Streaming for MCP

evidence.signal: Explicitly calls out: 'Real integrations need push capabilities - new emails, builds finished, PR comments'
Not in current spec. Tasks primitive (experimental) is closest, but only for long-running operations, not external events

demand_signals.community_sentiment: Recognized need but lower urgency than other gaps. Workarounds (polling, webhooks) exist.
demand_signals.competing_solutions_emerging: No direct solutions. Would require protocol-level change or standardized middleware.

validated_gaps.title: MCP Server Quality Assurance & Vetting Platform

evidence.signal: Scanned 1,808 MCP servers: 66% had security findings
Scanned 5,618 MCP servers for security vulnerabilities - massive community interest
'95% of MCP servers are utter garbage' - widely upvoted sentiment
'From Unknown to Verified: Solving the MCP Server Trust Problem'
'8,000+ MCP Servers Exposed: The Agentic AI Security Crisis of 2026'

demand_signals.community_sentiment: Universal concern. Security researchers actively scanning and publishing alarming findings. Trust is the #1 blocker for enterprise adoption.
demand_signals.competing_solutions_emerging: Glama scorecards (basic), Snyk agent-scan (new), Enkrypt scanner (new). Market is forming but fragmented.

evidence.signal: '5 Enterprise Challenges in Deploying Remote MCP Servers' - multi-tenancy cited as key blocker
'MCP Protocol Faces Growing Criticism Over Missing Enterprise Features and Security Gaps' - multi-tenancy highlighted

demand_signals.community_sentiment: Strong enterprise demand. SaaS companies wanting to add MCP need this.
demand_signals.competing_solutions_emerging: Lunar.dev MCPX at gateway level. No server-framework-level solution.

validated_gaps.title: MCP Server Persistent Memory / State Management

evidence.signal: Multiple MCP memory servers exist (mcp-memory-service, mcp-memory-keeper, agent-memory-mcp-server) - proves demand
Redis launched dedicated Agent Memory Server with MCP support
'Agent memory becomes a first-class MCP primitive' predicted for 2026

demand_signals.community_sentiment: Active development by multiple projects. Strong open-source demand. Not yet consolidated.
demand_signals.competing_solutions_emerging: Multiple individual MCP memory servers. No standardized solution or protocol primitive.

evidence.signal: MCPX Control Plane launched with centralized dashboard - validates demand
Peta launched as 'The Control Plane for MCP' with policy management and audit trails
MCP Hub for managing external MCP servers with access governance
'Enterprise MCP is the Control Plane for AI' - frames MCP management as critical infrastructure

demand_signals.community_sentiment: Enterprises urgently need this. Multiple startups racing to build control planes.
demand_signals.competing_solutions_emerging: Lunar MCPX, Peta, MontyCloud are emerging. Market still early and fragmented.

validated_gaps.title: MCP Server Supply Chain Security Scanner

evidence.signal: Snyk launched 'agent-scan' specifically for MCP supply chain security
Enkrypt launched MCP Scanner for static analysis of MCP servers during development
Published 'MCP Security: TOP 25 MCP Vulnerabilities' - comprehensive vulnerability taxonomy
$11M seed from Khosla/Felicis for MCP security - massive investor validation
Academic paper: 'MCPGuard: Automatically Detecting Vulnerabilities in MCP Servers'

demand_signals.community_sentiment: Critical urgency. Security researchers publishing alarming findings weekly. $11M+ in VC funding validates market.
demand_signals.competing_solutions_emerging: Snyk agent-scan, Enkrypt scanner, Runlayer. Market forming rapidly. Room for specialized tooling.

evidence.signal: Many 'How to build MCP server in [language]' articles - developers reinventing patterns per language
Smithery Scaffold exists but limited to specific patterns

demand_signals.community_sentiment: Nice-to-have rather than must-have. Developers are managing with existing SDKs.
demand_signals.competing_solutions_emerging: Language-specific SDKs are improving. Less urgent as official SDKs mature.

validated_gaps.title: MCP Server Cost & Token Usage Optimization

evidence.signal: 'How to analyze usage from your MCP Server' - early usage analytics
Context window exhaustion directly translates to cost: 72% of tokens wasted on schemas
Traffic visualization but no cost attribution or optimization recommendations

demand_signals.community_sentiment: Growing concern as MCP moves to production. Currently secondary to security and context bloat.
demand_signals.competing_solutions_emerging: No dedicated cost optimization tool. Analytics tools exist but don't optimize.
